==

=@@id="1_Ocsigen Toolkit client API"@@~Ocsigen ~Toolkit client ~A~P~I=




|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Lib >>||





==@@id="2_Widgets"@@~Widgets==




|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Buttons >>||
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Calendar >>||
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Carousel >>||
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Color_picker >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module implements a color picker~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Drawer >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Drawer menu for mobile and ~Web applications
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Form >>||
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Page_transition >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This widget helps realize page transition with screenshots~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Picture_uploader >>||
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Popup >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Popup widget
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Pulltorefresh >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Pull to refresh
    ~This widget can handle any element that needs to be refreshed
    after being pulled down~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Range >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Range selection widget
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Spinner >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Spinner widget
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Sticky >>||
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module is an interface to get~Computed~Style~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Swipe >>||
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Time_picker >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module implements a clock~-style time picker~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Toggle >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Binary toggle widget
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Tongue >>||





==@@id="2_DOM utilities"@@~D~O~M utilities==




|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Nodeready >>||
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Noderesize >>||
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>||
|<<a_api subproject="client" | module Tip >>||





==@@id="2_Indexes"@@~Indexes==



* <<a_api subproject="client" text="Index of types" | index types >>
* <<a_api subproject="client" text="Index of values" | index values >>
* <<a_api subproject="client" text="Index of modules" | index modules >>
* <<a_api subproject="client" text="Index of module types" | index module types >>
